algorithm_contract.description: The update must describe FIFO dequeue/enqueue behavior for the frontier queue.

modality_boundary_note: Only model_facing is intended for model prompts; gold_scoring_metadata is evaluator-only.

model_facing.algorithm_definition: Breadth First Search: maintain a FIFO queue of states. Dequeue the front state; if it satisfies the goal, return. Otherwise enqueue all valid successor states and repeat.

language_input.natural_language_goal: Achieve these Blocksworld goal atoms: on(a,b).

output_format.internal_state_update: one-step planner-state update for the requested algorithm

model_facing.system: You are executing bfs on one Blocksworld task.
model_facing.task_instruction: Execute the next step of bfs and respond only with JSON.
